name: HoloAdvent Roommates
description: I had made this bot before I finished the roadtrip bot but I forgot to publish it after testing it so here ya go. This bot only includes members of HoloAdvent with Fuwawa and Mococo being separate characters although I bet most already assumed that. As per usual I hope you enjoy the bot and let me know if there’s anything I should improve.
creator: Pandapple
